common.enterEmailError: Jọwọ tẹ adirẹsi imeeli rẹ sii

login.title: Ẹnu-ọna Akọnilopin
login.subtitle: Wọle lati wo awọn idije rẹ, awọn ikun, ati awọn ipo ẹgbẹ
login.appleIdentityTokenError: Apple ko da idanimọ pada. Jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
login.enterEmailAndPassword: Jọwọ tẹ imeeli ati ọrọigbaniwọle rẹ sii

register.title: Ṣẹda Akọọlẹ Akọnilopin
register.subtitle: Forukọsilẹ lati tọpinpin awọn ikun rẹ ati darapọ mọ awọn ẹgbẹ
register.alreadyHaveAccount: Ṣe o ti ni akọọlẹ tẹlẹ?
register.verificationLinkSentTo: A ti firanṣẹ ọna asopọ ijẹrisi si
register.activateAccountInstructions: Tẹ lori ọna asopọ ninu imeeli lati mu akọọlẹ rẹ ṣiṣẹ, lẹhinna wọle nibi.
register.verificationEmailFailedFallback: A ṣẹda akọọlẹ rẹ, ṣugbọn a ko le firanṣẹ imeeli ijẹrisi ni bayi. Wọle ki o lo 'Tun fi imeeli ijẹrisi ranṣẹ' lati gba ọna asopọ tuntun.
register.allFieldsRequired: Gbogbo awọn aaye ni a beere
register.passwordMin8: Ọrọigbaniwọle gbọdọ jẹ o kere ju awọn kikọ 8

forgotPassword.title: Tun Ọrọigbaniwọle Ṣe
forgotPassword.subtitle: A o firanṣẹ ọna asopọ atunto si adirẹsi imeeli rẹ ti o forukọsilẹ
forgotPassword.sentBodySuffix: , a ti firanṣẹ ọna asopọ atunto ọrọigbaniwọle. Yoo pari ni wakati 1.

resendVerification.title: Tun Ijẹrisi Ranṣẹ
resendVerification.subtitle: Tẹ adirẹsi imeeli rẹ sii, a o si firanṣẹ ọna asopọ ijẹrisi tuntun.
resendVerification.sentBody: Ọna asopọ ijẹrisi tuntun ti firanṣẹ si {{email}}. Ṣayẹwo apo-iwọle rẹ.
resendVerification.failedToResendVerification: Ko le tun imeeli ijẹrisi ranṣẹ
